MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ELIZABETH A. MACDONALD, TEL. NO. 922-5939 SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT WILL REVIEW THE COURTESY COPIES TO BE SUBMITTED BY MS. MCDONALD BEFORE SIGNING AN ORDER. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ACE PROPERTY & CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion For Assignment Order Re: Rights To Payment Of Money Due Or To Become Due is Granted. No opposition filed. Judge: Harold E.
